title: lichen-rpl: DODAG state machine with MRHOF parent selection
description: dodag.rs: port of Python dodag.py. DodagState tracks role (UNJOINED/JOINED/ROOT), rank, preferred_parent, candidates map. process_dio updates candidates and calls select_parent (MRHOF with hysteresis). remove_parent triggers re-selection. Tests: 5-node join sequence, parent switch on link failure.
